programme.title: 'Revenge pornography': Chrissy Chambers' search for justice
programme.desc: In April, it became a crime in England and Wales to post ‘revenge pornography'. Chrissy Chambers and her girlfriend Bria are YouTube's most popular lesbian content creators. The two channels they run have almost half a million subscribers. But before Chrissy came out, she had a boyfriend. He also has videos of her. And she says he's using them to destroy her

programme.title: He died sitting on our front porch: the fight to stop Chicago's gang killings
programme.desc: Over the Fourth of July weekend, over 100 people were shot in Chicago – a worrying increase after the city's murder rate had fallen to its lowest level in 40 years. Adam Gabbatt visits the city's south side to understand why gang violence remains such a problem – and how grassroots groups are working to prevent it

programme.title: Lives Instead of Knives': one woman's struggle to end knife crime
programme.desc: Smith's Farm Estate in Northolt, north-west London, has been the scene of multiple stabbings. After one murder came particularly close to home, community volunteer Jen Lock began a one-woman mission to end knife crime in the area. But, as she finds out, things don't always go smoothly.

programme.title: The hunt for Europe's great white shark
programme.desc: American research group Ocearch has more than 15 years' experience in catching, tagging and tracking great white sharks all over the world, contributing to filling in the many gaps in knowledge about the ocean predator. Ocearch came to Europe for the first time in the summer, hoping to study the elusive Mediterranean great white – about which little is known. Due to decades of overfishing, pollution and poaching in European waters, these sharks are now critically endangered, with huge consequences lower down the food chain.

programme.title: Burned to the Ground: the Canadian village incinerated by record temperatures
programme.desc: The small village of Lytton in British Columbia hit the global media when it smashed Canada's highest temperature record in June 2021, at 49.6C. Two days later, a wildfire burned the entire village to the ground. In the ashes of their homes, this cohesive but diverse community, which includes a majority of First Nations people, had to confront the realities of climate displacement by being relocated away from their ancestral lands. Through the stories of three residents we find a community searching for answers while relying on a collective spirit to heal

programme.title: How to make a pearl
programme.desc: For 53 years, John Kapellas enjoyed the bright sky of the western US, but one day he started to burn, blister and break out in rashes whenever he was exposed to light. Now allergic to the entire spectrum of light, Kapellas has spent the last decade living in complete darkness. When one of the side effects of the drugs John was prescribed made him ‘go nuts', he started drawing large abstract pictures on his walls and playing the piano to calm his mind and soothe the pain.

programme.title: How to See Through Fog: a portrait of a mining town in its darkest days
programme.desc: Queenstown, on the remote west coast of Tasmania, is known for two things: copper mining and the harsh gravel oval that is home to the local Australian rules football team. A series of deaths at the Mount Lyell mine brought operations to a standstill and put the future of the town in doubt. Thomas Hyland's evocative film, shown here after screenings at the Unconformity festival, tracks the story of the town, the people and their football team through shock, grief and change.

programme.title: A sceptic's guide to wellness
programme.desc: Guardian journalist Richard Sprenger journeys into the wellness industry to see what it can offer people with autoimmune conditions. (S1 E01)

programme.title: The case for language learning
programme.desc: Join the national debate on the importance of language learning and help us put languages back on the agenda. Content in this series is financially supported by the British Academy and editorially independent. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Desert Fire
programme.desc: Football's world cup for unrecognised territories is viewed through the eyes of the manager and players of one of the most fascinating teams, Iraqi Kurdistan.

programme.title: Sprinter Factory
programme.desc: These are the girls running as fast as they can to be Jamaica's new sprint champions in a country obsessed with its athletes. This is the story of the Champs national youth athletics competition that could change their lives.

programme.title: After Windrush – Paulette Wilson's visit to Jamaica, 50 years on
programme.desc: A letter from the British government classifying Paulette Wilson as an illegal immigrant shook her sense of identity and belonging. ‘Hostile environment' policies years in the making meant that Wilson and other victims of the Windrush scandal had their right to residency in the UK called into question. She had been detained for a week pending imminent deportation though she had done nothing wrong. It was devastating, but luckily she was released before she was deported.

programme.title: Is my neighbourhood poisoning me? Living in the shadow of a gasworks redevelopment
programme.desc: Since 2016 residents in Southall have questioned whether the gases released from the redevelopment of an old gasworks site could be damaging their health. We followed them for a year as they grow their campaign group, question the authorities and demand to know if the increased air pollution from the site could have put them at greater risk during the coronavirus pandemic

programme.title: Home Economics
programme.desc: On the season finale of “Home Economics,” the family celebrate their parents' anniversary. But after they learn what Tom's new novel is about, the celebration may just be the worst one yet!

programme.title: Scot Squad
programme.desc: Canine courage is officially recognised by the force when PC Leanne Hunter is summoned to meet the Chief so that her partner PD Bonzo can receive a medal.

programme.title: Scot Squad
programme.desc: PCs Fletcher and McLaren go that extra mile to assist a top TV meteorologist.

programme.title: Ben´s Menu
programme.desc: Ben makes some small Pumpkin, Pesto & Ricotta Fritters in a frypan, then travels to Geronimo in Launceston to compare Beef Cheek recipes with head chef Sam Pinkard. Back in the home kitchen Ben bakes a warm Rhubarb & Ginger Skillet Pie.

programme.title: Ben´s Menu
programme.desc: Ben hosts a friend from Bessemer and is amazed by their simple, stovetop Chicken Curry recipe. He then braises a versatile pork recipe and uses the slow-cooked meat to makes both Pulled Pork Sliders and Pulled Pork Cannelloni to inspire weekly meal planners.

programme.title: Ben´s Menu
programme.desc: Ben makes a fresh Mussels Sambal in his home kitchen before paying a visit to the Red Feather Inn for a quick lesson in making Ricotta Agnolotti Pasta by hand. Back home again Ben whips up a decadent Tiramisu.

programme.title: Ben´s Menu
programme.desc: Ben shares his family's favourite Prawn Saganaki recipe, before visiting Willie Smith's Apple Shed in the Huon Valley to try their apple cider vinegar Pickled Beetroot Salad. Back home again, Ben is joined by a friend from Chef's Toolbox to make a delicious Risoni Risotto.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We have returned to the powerhouse of Portugal for an edge-of-your-seat galactic battle. If all the planets collided at once, it wouldn't compare to the bang of this show. Get ready for the battle of the beasts it's the heaviest show in the universe, the Strongman Champions League. (S9 E08)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: SCL UK has landed in Gloucester it is workout war fitness for the ferocious, it's going to be a a battle of the brutal, a rampage of the roofless. This is going to be a massacre of the muscles. You know it by now, but just in case you don't, this is strongman champions league. (S9 E09)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: On the menu this week it's medieval madness, we've come back to the middle ages to test our noble men through a muscle gaining of events. They are hoping and we are hoping that one will survive to take the title of the world's strongest Viking. The official World's Strongest Viking is this time in Finland. (S9 E10)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This week is a good one, can you feel the energy? Sit still, just look at me and try and feel the energy, because I can tell you, the atmosphere here is electric, it's explosive, there is a pure elemental force going through these athletes' veins. I'm shaking because it's Poland, it's powerful, it's strongman champions league, and you know what I'm going to say, get ready because it's about to get heavy. (S9 E11)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: SCL Poland part 2 - Who will win the title in Poland and take 25 points for the world ranking. It is very exciting on the top, in part 1 between Poland and Latvia. Another great episode with super strongman events such as: Bag Toss Medley, Log Lift Reps and the Powerstairs. Also an interview with Mateusz Kieloszkowski, the all time favorite champion from Poland. (S9 E12)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: It's time to show our strength and gain respect from the gods of Olympus. Our gladiators have many events set out by no other than Hercules himself. The coliseum is ready here on this mythological island of Cyprus, so we have landed in Limassol were again 12 Top Strongmen are battling for the title and ranking points. (S9 E13)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The only and official world championship Truckpulling for its 10th year, again at the Strongman Champions league. With the 3 times Worldchampion Kelvin de Ruiter – defending his title. This championship has trucks in all shapes and sizes which is a lot like our athletes, there all different pay loads, but does the biggest win or is it the strongest. (S9 E14)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Years and years of determination has brought us here today, when all the walls felt like they were caving in perseverance. When their bodies were screaming, hurting, shouting stop, beneath. These are the things which make up a man, these are the things that bring you world finalists. This episode they fight for the greatest title of all, they fight to put their names in the history books forever. (S9 E15)

programme.title: The Fortrex And The Furious
programme.desc: In a massive chase around Knighton, the NEXO-Knights attempt to keep the Book of Betrayal out of the Book of Monster's grip. But the evil book is persistent. Will he get the final piece of his evil puzzle? We finally REVEAL that Jestro has given the Book of Betrayal to…Clay. He tells Clay what it is and how Mike Knight used it. And it seems that the Book of Monsters believed it to be the final ingredient in some ‘Master Plan.” Suddenly, they realize Monsters – led by Magmar and the super-mad Book of Monster – are after them! Clay retreats with Jestro and the Book of Betrayal to rendezvous with the other Knights at the Fortrex. The Fortrex isn't fast enough they'll need their own vehicles. They decide that they need to split up and go in multiple directions to make the monsters expend their resources on a chase. It's a huge chase, being covered like a crazy news event by the Knighton News Network. We see a montage of the monsters stopping and capturing all the Knights vehicles: Aaron, Macy, Lance…finally Axl. However, as they do, they realize that the Knights have used Squirebots in Jestro Fan Jester hats (from the vendor at the comedy club in 108) as decoys. They think Axl has the Book of Betrayal in his BRICK containment unit, but it turns out to be the Ned Knightly Comic from episode 203. The Monsters finally corner Clay, who has the real Jestro and Book of Betrayal in his sword vehicle. Before Clay can protest, Jestro pushes the launch button and fires off Clay in the vehicle's rocket sword. The monsters race off with Jestro, leaving the shocked Clay fearing for his friend. Now, Magmar tells the Book of Monsters, they only need to get BOB. Clay makes his way back to the Fortrex and tells what has happened. They decide they must get to the Redoubt of Ruination in the Lava Lands and try to save Jestro. Meanwhile, we see, INTERCUT, a scene where Merlok 2.0 and the Book of Monsters explain the Books of Evil, how they were created and what the BOM will use them for. Merlok, back in the day, split the evil MONSTRUX into 10 magic books to keep him from ever being a threat. Only, he didn't destroy the books…and now the BOM has them and Monstrux can come back into the world! Meanwhile, the BOM has set up the huge, ceremonial arena at their HQ so they can have the ceremony to bring Monstrux back into the world. Jestro realizes he's been a pawn of the Book of Monsters. Jestro says he'll never get the Book of Betrayal…the Knights have it. In the last scene, we see Clay taking the Book of Betrayal from the Fortrex, climbing into his vehicle and driving towards…the Redoubt of Ruination! Has the Book of Betrayal worked its evil magic on him?!

programme.title: Kingdom Of Heroes
programme.desc: The Book of Monsters, having the final pieces of his evil plan in place, tries to take human form. Can the NEXO-Knights and Merlok 2.0 stop the greatest threat they've ever faced? Or will the kingdom be plunged into darkness…forever. The Redoubt of Ruination readies the final ceremony to call forth MONSTRUX, the arch-necromancer of the past. Clay, holding the Book of Betrayal walks to the gates of the spooky place. Inside, Clay hears strange…singing and music. It's like a twisted Broadway show of some kind. Meanwhile, the Knights all realize Clay is gone and so is the Book of Betrayal. Macy says Clay must be up to something. They have to trust him and, more importantly, they have to find him. At the Redoubt of Ruination the ceremony has already begun! The Book of Monsters wants the final ceremony that calls forth Monstrux to be like a really great show! The BOM then barfs up all the BOOKS OF EVIL into their places around Jestro. He's just missing the BOOK OF BETRAYAL, which Clay has. Clay says he'll trade the book for Jestro. The BOM immediately agrees to the deal and sets Jestro free. Then, Monsters grab-up Clay, restrain him, and put him in Jestro's place on the sacrifice stone. From outside, they're interrupted by the sounds of battle the Knights have arrived on the Fortrex and are attacking the Redoubt of Ruination. In the confusion, Jestro slips away. The BOM lets loose with a powerful protection spell to keep the Knights out as he starts with the ceremony…he's going to bring Monstrux out and remanifest him in Clay's body! Jestro is able to escape the Redoubt and make his way to the Knights, who can't seem to battle their way in. It's a race against time as the Knights try to get in and save Clay. As the Knights get in, they see that the crazy BOM is absorbing all the Books of Evil, one-by-one. He grows BIGGER and BIGGER! Macy calls for NEXO-Power…but it's not enough! The gigantic Book of Monsters sucks down the final book, the Book of Betrayal! He looms over Clay, about to consume him, too, and make him into Monstrux! Suddenly, Robin appears carrying TECHKALIBER…he tosses it to Clay. Just as the huge Book of Monsters falls on Clay, he holds up Techkaliber and Merlok 2.0 is there…his full power in the sword. Clay sticks the sword into the Book of Monster's huge mouth. BOOM! There's a BIG, MAGICAL EXPLOSION! As we cut back inside, we see the Book of Monsters is gone. The Knights release Clay and he thanks them and Jestro for saving him. Jestro thanks them all for saving him and seeing the good in him. WE DISSOLVE TO: The JoustDome. In a final ceremony the King and Queen reward the knights and congratulate them for keeping the kingdom safe. There are speeches, happiness and friendship. And Jestro even does a bit that's funny. At the very end we see a hint of something…Monstrux and the Book of Monsters are still out there.

programme.title: The Jade Princess
programme.desc: In the wake of an assassination attempt targeting the royal family, the ninja invite the royal princess, HARUMI, into their makeshift family. Lloyd glimpses someone escaping over the rooftops with a sack on their back. Fearing it is the kidnapped princess, Lloyd takes up the chase! He discovers to his surprise, however, that the masked intruder is none other than the princess herself, who is not quite as docile or meek as she pretends. She has a habit of sneaking out of her chambers at night to feed the homeless who surround the Imperial Palace. This revelation only endears her to Lloyd more and Harumi and Lloyd quickly strike up a friendship. Unfortunately, trouble catches up to the ninja when the Sons Of Garmadon target the second Oni mask and attack the palace. The scope of the attack proves more than the Ninja were prepared for as the Sons of Garmadon detonate a series of subterranean bombs, bringing down part of the palace. Lloyd and Harumi escape onto the flying ship, DESTINY'S BOUNTY. But the victory is a pyrrhic one. The second Oni Mask has been stolen and Harumi's parents and Master Hutchins are feared lost.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh?

programme.title: Floss Dance
programme.desc: Learn the dance "The Floss" with LEGO Friends and experience the much more fun.

programme.title: Karoake and Music Special
programme.desc: LEGO Friends are having fun with Karaoke and music.

programme.title: Celebrating The Special Day
programme.desc: Here, the girls go on an adventurous balloon ride. Watch how much fun they have.

programme.title: Only One Can Remain
programme.desc: On the island, Lloyd learns that his father used to train under the deceitful Master Chen and when the Ninja meet the playfully deceitful ruler, they realize they are in a tournament where “Only one can remain.” On the island, Lloyd learns his father used to train under the deceitful Master Chen. They meet the playfully deceitful ruler who tells them they are in a tournament where ‘Only one can remain'. When they are spoiled by their posh quarters, they are surprised to find the game is already afoot: Last person to find a Jade Blade is out. After an epic battle of elemental powers, Kai steals the last one from Karlof, who is kicked out of the tournament through a trap door leading to the unknown. Later that night, the Ninja go in search for Zane but come across an underground temple where Chen and his Anacondrai Worshippers steal Karlof's power. Is this a fighting tournament, or a ploy to steal everyone's power?

programme.title: Versus
programme.desc: In order find Zane, the Ninja stay in the tournament to get past the first round but Chen complicates things by changing the bracket and pitting Jay against Cole. In order to find Zane and get to the bottom of Chen's mysterious plot the Ninja need to stay in the tournament and get past the first round. Chen complicates things by changing the bracket and pitting Jay against Cole. Meanwhile, new Titanium Ninja Zane is locked in a dungeon and has a nightmare about a ferocious Ice Dragon. Guided by the voice of Pixal, he embraces his new technology and escapes his cell, only to find Pixal hasn't fared as well. Though she has no body, he inputs her CPU into his, uniting the two. In an attempt to prevent Jay versus Cole, the Ninja enlist the Master of Mind to help, but are unable to prevent the inevitable. In a gladiator battle, Jay and Cole put aside their feud to throw the match --enraging Chen to send Cole down the mysterious trap door. Lastly, Nya sees Zane's beacon is working again and is on the hunt for them.

programme.title: Winds Of Change
programme.desc: Kai promises to watch over Lloyd when Lloyd fears the loss of his father will make the path ahead uncertain– but when Wu sends them out on an errand for his new Tea Farm, Lloyd goes on a solo mission... only to discover it's a trap from a GHOST who's escaped the Cursed Realm. After the Ninja save a small fishing village, Lloyd fears the loss of his father will make the path ahead uncertain but Kai promises to watch over him. When Wu sends them out on an errand for his new Tea Farm, Lloyd goes on a solo mission... only it's a trap from a GHOST who's escaped the Cursed Realm. When the Ninja's powers mysteriously disappear, they return to the Tea Farm and are attacked by Lloyd, who is possessed by the spirit of Moro, the Master of Wind! After a harrowing escape on the Bounty, Wu tells the Ninja they weren't his first pupils!

programme.title: Ghost Story
programme.desc: When Moro gives chase to the Bounty and steals Wu's staff, Wu shares the story of Moro: the boy who wanted to be the Green Ninja – and the Ninja discover Wu's staff contained 3 symbols that lead to the Tomb of the First Spinjitzu Master which holds a mysterious relic that could alter the course of Ninjago. Moro gives chase to the Bounty and steals Wu's staff, leaving them to crash. When the dust settles, Wu shares the story of Moro: the boy who wanted to be the Green Ninja. They discover Wu's staff contained 3 symbols that lead to the Tomb of the First Spinjitzu Master which holds a mysterious relic that could alter the course of Ninjago. In order to save Lloyd and get their powers back, they set off to find the first clue – the scroll to the lost martial art of ‘Airjitzu'. On their way to get it, they have a run in with one of Moro's ghost generals Wraythe, and discover water is the key to stopping them. Meanwhile, Nya discovers a family secret – her mother was a Water Ninja and with training, she could be one too.

programme.title: Saturday Knight Fever
programme.desc: The Book of Monsters catching a cold means trouble for the NEXO-Knights when he can create an entirely new kind of “snotty” monster. King and Queen Halbert have journeyed to the town of Cleanington to open the brand new Scrubbery Barn at the invitation of Roger the Scrubber (seen in 104.) Meanwhile, the Book of Monsters drags Jestro to Snottingham – one of the coldest places in Knighton where everyone coughs, has a runny nose and is generally under-the-weather. The BOM demands that Jestro feed him a “snotheiser” ball which will probably make him sick. The BOM explains that if he is sick, he may just produce a whole new breed of magical monsters … some that the knights would NEVER expect. The BOM gets sick and starts coughing up phlegm globlins and bloblins. The Knights arrive, alerted to what they think is an attack on the town by Snottingham's mayor, Hack Coughmeier. The sickened, sneezy, snotty monsters infect the knights and, more importantly, the knights' NEXO-Shields. Now their NEXO-Powers are infected. As they try to download something to fight the monsters, they realize the powers they get are off strange, infected versions of their powers. The knights drive Jestro and his snot monsters off and they turn in for the night. And, overnight, they all get sick. Meanwhile, the BOM order a nice, hot lava bath…he'll feel fine by morning. But the knights wake-up with colds and they feel terrible. Ava and Merlok 2.0 thinks it will pass in a day or two…it's just a typical Snottingham cold. Each knight gets sick in their own funny way and their illnesses play right into Jestro and the BOM's hands: they're headed to Cleanington to kidnap the king! The citizens of the ultra-clean city hate the sight of monsters, but then feel caught in between when the sick, sneezy, snotty knights arrive on their Fortrex. The fight goes terribly for the knights. They try to download the Nexo-power “Glorious Griffon” but instead get just feathers. So they improvise and tickle the monsters! Ava finally comes up with a way to use some anti-virus tools on their NEXO-Shields and just as Jestro is about to take the king and queen away, the NEXO-Knights get their normal powers back! They defeat Jestro and save the king and queen.

programme.title: Open Mike Knight
programme.desc: The Book of Betrayal leads Jestro and his Monsters to Funnyton – the funnies town in the kingdom. When they Knights arrive to capture him, they discover (to their shock) that Jestro and the Book of Monsters are now the town's top comedians! Jestro and his monsters are in attack formation moving to pillage the town of Funnyton. But when they arrive, ready to tear into the place, they see that nobody's in town. Then, they hear…laughter?! The entire town is there listening to a stand-up comic JOKES KNIGHTLY. He's hilarious. He commands such power, such attention, and such loyalty. Jestro and the BOM decide they must become funny. They order all kinds of book on comedy from Spamazon: books on parody, irony, insult humor, slapstick, satire, knock-knock jokes, elephant jokes, “my monster is so fat” jokes, etc. They work-up a ventriloquist act with the BOM sitting on Jestro's lap. They start doing their act and, surprisingly, they're funny. They're very funny. The Fortrex arrives and the knights rush out, ready for battle. They fight through a string of monsters just outside the town, but discover they're only working as “bouncers” to keep too many people out of the comedy club. (“Sorry, you guys aren't on the list.”) The knights hear loud laughs and head there. In the club, they discover the town isn't being held hostage, they're in the show voluntarily having a great time. And…Jestro and the BOM are funny. Meanwhile, during the show, Jokes Knightly decides he'll steal the BOM and Jestro's act. During the intermission at the comedy show, Clay comes backstage to talk to Jestro. Maybe, Clay says, this shows that Jestro doesn't have to be bad…he is funny, like Clay always said he was. Meanwhile, Jokes Knightly steals the BOM and Jestro can't find it. He panics. Clay encourages him…go on stage alone, be funny…he can do it! Jestro goes out and is funny on his own he hits all his punchlines, he gets big laughs he starts to see that Clay is right. The BOM sees that Jokes Knightly has a “joke book” that turns out to be the BOOK OF BETRAYAL. That's how Mike Knight has become so funny – by stealing everyone's material! BOM calls in Magmar, who saves him from Mike Knight AND takes the Book of Betrayal. As Jestro comes off-stage to great applause, the BOM tells him they have the Book of Betrayal. The BOM calls in Magmar and his monsters and they start a fight as Clay comes to Jestro's defense and calls on the other Knights for backup. A big battle ensues that destroys the comedy club in Funnyton. The Knights win and drive-off Magmar, the monsters and the BOM. As they retreat, the BOM looks around: “Where's my Jestro?!” Jestro sneaked away during the fight and is in a nearby forest with…the Book of Betrayal.

programme.title: The Fortrex And The Furious
programme.desc: In a massive chase around Knighton, the NEXO-Knights attempt to keep the Book of Betrayal out of the Book of Monster's grip. But the evil book is persistent. Will he get the final piece of his evil puzzle? We finally REVEAL that Jestro has given the Book of Betrayal to…Clay. He tells Clay what it is and how Mike Knight used it. And it seems that the Book of Monsters believed it to be the final ingredient in some ‘Master Plan.” Suddenly, they realize Monsters – led by Magmar and the super-mad Book of Monster – are after them! Clay retreats with Jestro and the Book of Betrayal to rendezvous with the other Knights at the Fortrex. The Fortrex isn't fast enough they'll need their own vehicles. They decide that they need to split up and go in multiple directions to make the monsters expend their resources on a chase. It's a huge chase, being covered like a crazy news event by the Knighton News Network. We see a montage of the monsters stopping and capturing all the Knights vehicles: Aaron, Macy, Lance…finally Axl. However, as they do, they realize that the Knights have used Squirebots in Jestro Fan Jester hats (from the vendor at the comedy club in 108) as decoys. They think Axl has the Book of Betrayal in his BRICK containment unit, but it turns out to be the Ned Knightly Comic from episode 203. The Monsters finally corner Clay, who has the real Jestro and Book of Betrayal in his sword vehicle. Before Clay can protest, Jestro pushes the launch button and fires off Clay in the vehicle's rocket sword. The monsters race off with Jestro, leaving the shocked Clay fearing for his friend. Now, Magmar tells the Book of Monsters, they only need to get BOB. Clay makes his way back to the Fortrex and tells what has happened. They decide they must get to the Redoubt of Ruination in the Lava Lands and try to save Jestro. Meanwhile, we see, INTERCUT, a scene where Merlok 2.0 and the Book of Monsters explain the Books of Evil, how they were created and what the BOM will use them for. Merlok, back in the day, split the evil MONSTRUX into 10 magic books to keep him from ever being a threat. Only, he didn't destroy the books…and now the BOM has them and Monstrux can come back into the world! Meanwhile, the BOM has set up the huge, ceremonial arena at their HQ so they can have the ceremony to bring Monstrux back into the world. Jestro realizes he's been a pawn of the Book of Monsters. Jestro says he'll never get the Book of Betrayal…the Knights have it. In the last scene, we see Clay taking the Book of Betrayal from the Fortrex, climbing into his vehicle and driving towards…the Redoubt of Ruination! Has the Book of Betrayal worked its evil magic on him?!

programme.desc: It started out as an experiment and became a brutal lesson in survival.

programme.title: Transformers

programme.title: Transformers

programme.title: Transformers

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: At his teammates' urging, Hoist invents some new "cool tools" to improve their rescue abilities.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Burns family and their Bots plan a heist to steal back Energon and technology.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Kade's idol, a pompous movie star, comes to Griffin Rock to prepare for a role.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The race for the Omega Keys grows more desperate.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: When the Decepticons take him captive, Smokescreen learns of the location of thefinal Omega Key.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Starscream proposes a truce to Megatron, but Dreadwing threatens to stand in the way of his return.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the other Autobots try to breakthrough the energon grid.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots battle, but this time in cyberspace, a virtual training program.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Every Picture Smurfs A Story: The evil Maestro's magical paints have the power to transport his models onto canvas – forever! Papa Smurf directs Painter to switch his paints and before long, Maestro is enshrined in a picture next to his dream girl, Smurfette.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Greedy Goes On Strike: Get up early in the morning, before any other Smurf is out of bed, to prepare a scrumptious Smurfberry muffin. Spend all morning on preparing Smurf delicacies for lunch. Than all afternoon to have dinner ready – and delicious – on time. And do you get so much as a thank you form the Smurfs? So Greedy Smurf quits. The Village is in trouble... And soon, so is Greedy.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Master Smurf: There is an evil power in the Titan's crown that Miner Smurf finds underground. And Greedy Smurf is the Smurf to fall victim to it. Then Gargamel comes up with some new schemes to destroy the Smurfs, and everything gets hopelessly tangled.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Sassette's Tooth: Oh dear! Sassette has lost a tooth. Papa Smurf explains that if she puts her tooth under her pillow, the Mouse Fairy will bring her a present in the morning. But the next morning there is no present under the pillow. The Mouse Fairy has not been. She has been captured in one of Gargamel's Smurf traps. And now the evil wizard is concocting a dreadful plan.

programme.title: The Baby Smurf
programme.desc: Gargamel turns himself into a Baby Smurf, to be adopted by the Smurfette. He causes complete chaos in the Smurf Village when he tries to blow it up with a time bomb! Papa Smurf discovers his evil plot and uses the explosive to send the wizard back to his dismal castle.

programme.title: Smurfiplication
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel creates a magic formula that duplicates everything it touches. And surprise! Suddenly there are six Brainy Smurf! This creates a few interesting situations in the Village... And also at Gargamel's!

programme.title: Smurfs On Wheels
programme.desc: Every year, all the Smurfs make the long hike to Dreamy Steamy Springs. But this year, only Grandpa Smurf, Papa Smurf and Nat are going to walk there. All the other Smurfs are too busy – and too lazy – to walk. But then Handy comes up with what he calls his Customised Smurfwagon. No need to walk, you just let yourself roll along... Of course, things won't be as simple as all that.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Jokey's Cloak: What is in the box that's been found by Jokey Smurf? A cloak belonging to Wizlow the Magician gnome. And what sort of cloak? Jokey learns that it's a cloak of invisibility. Whoever wears it has a great opportunity of playing practical jokes... And guess what havoc an invisible Jokey is able to wreak on the Village. Yet if Wizlow parted with the cloak, there must be a reason...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Smurfs' Time Capsule: As the Smurfs busily build a time capsule for all of their talents, Papa Smurf frantically tries to unravel an ancient Druid riddle before disaster strikes the forest.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Little Orange Horse With Gold Shoes: Sliding down a rainbow, a little winged horse loses a golden shoe. He meets the Smurfette and she helps him look for his lost horseshoe. They fall in love somehow, for who could be unmoved by the charm of a little orange horse... Or of a Smurfette?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Baby's First Christmas: The wonderful joy of Christmas for Baby Smurf and everyone else is almost ruined by the evil Chlorhydris who puts a spell on Mr. Nicholas to stop him from spreading holiday cheer. Fortunately, Papa Smurf and his little blue creatures break the spell and Christmas spreads over the land once more.

programme.title: Monster Smurfs
programme.desc: This is spook-a-Smurf eve, and all the Smurfs get ready for the fancy dress party… But Brainy Smurf gets hold of Papa Smurf's Book of Magic, and all the Smurfs are changed into hideous but funny creatures. Yet danger lurks...

programme.title: The Bad Place
programme.desc: What is this little moon coming from above? Why, it's a crater-pockmarked globe of mud inhabited by the Grimeys, a family of mud-splattering, mud-eating creatures from out there in the sky. Not all the Smurfs are enthusiastic about the visitors....

programme.title: Mud-Wrestling Smurfs
programme.desc: The Wartmongers are draining Smurf River to make mud for their wrestling matches. Clumsy, who has been feeling like a loser at sports, becomes a hero when he must wrestle the Mad Maher as a distraction, enabling Papa and Hefty to break into the factory and destroy the mud making machine.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Baby's New Toy: Baby Smurf has lost all interest in toys. Even Jokey's surprises fail to amuse the tiny tyke. Grandpa Smurf suggests they go and pay a visit to the Toymaker, the one who makes toys for children all over the world. Or rather used to make: the Toymaker is tired of the lack of appreciation his toys receive from those who receive them.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Sir Hefty: Sir Hefty discovers a wayward knight to help him defeat a dragon whose fire is threatening to destroy the forest. Alas, the knight proves to be a coward, leaving Hefty to prove just how brave he is when he sends the dragon away from Smurf Village.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Tis The Season To Be Smurfy: This is Wild Smurf's first Christmas, and he's impressed by the decorations in the Village of the Smurfs. But Grandpa and Sassette are going to teach him the real meaning of Christmas when they help an old couple to live the most beautiful Christmas they've ever seen...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Dark-Ness Monster: When Brainy loses his glasses, he drops things, runs into objects, and becomes just as helpless as Clumsy, who now has to read to Brainy and help him get around. This experience makes Brainy feel guilty for the way he always made fun of Clumsy. He treats him with more respect once he receives a new pair of glasses.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Stuck On Smurfs: Gargamel pours a glue-like potion on Clumsy and when anyone touches him, they become stuck to him. The Smurfs become linked to each other until Papa grabs Gargamel's nose. Gargamel, who is annoyed at having all the Smurfs stuck to him, devises a counter-potion and the Smurfs are free once more.

programme.title: The Rabbids rebel.
programme.desc: Thanks to the Teleporta-TV, the rabbids lay hands on a voodoo doll with strange powers…

programme.title: The Rabbids are lost
programme.desc: A rabbid who got talent after having inhaled the air from a balloon, is suddenly destined to become a star!

programme.title: Super Rabbids to the rescue
programme.desc: Beware ! The three rabbids with super powers have the worst plan to get to the moon!

programme.title: The Rabbids don't understand anything.
programme.desc: While walking on a plastic ball, a Rabbid discovers that the ball seems to attract a dog from the park.

programme.title: The Rabbids aim for the moon!
programme.desc: The only way for rabbids to get into their rocket to reach the moon is to go on a drastic diet!

programme.title: The Rabbids make their cinema.
programme.desc: A cowboy rabbid has come back to town looking for the outlaw rabbid who destroyed his rocking horse.

programme.title: The Rabbids make their cinema.

programme.title: The Rabbids are arguing.
programme.desc: A Rabbid sticks a fake nose on his face, that changes the sound of his voice.

programme.title: The Rabbids are too cold.
programme.desc: An old lady distracts a Rabbid, and he accidentally shuts himself inside a supermarket freezer.

programme.title: The Rabbids turn the city upside down.
programme.desc: The Rabbids get their hands on a remote-controlled car, and figure out how to use the controller.

programme.title: Rabbids experience.
programme.desc: In a laboratory, the Rabbids are subjected to tests designed to determine just how idiotic they really are.

programme.title: The Rabbids are crashing
programme.desc: A baby inadvertently gets swapped with a rabbid at the babysitter's expense.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: The adventures of Dennis, his dog Gnasher, and their best friends JJ, Rubi and Pieface. The team cause havoc to Walter, Beanotown and Bash Street School, where all the rules go out the window. (S3 E01)

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher: Stunt Gran
programme.desc: Walter shows off some new tricks on his fancy skateboard, prompting Dennis to make a jibe that even his Gran could do tricks like that with such a high-tech boar and the bet is on! However, Walter secretly sabotages the trick, causing Gran to hang up her menacing shoes as a matter of public safety. It's up to Dennis, Gnasher and Angel Face to expose the truth and get Gran back to her wily self. Followed by more Dennis episodes.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and his pet dog, Gnasher, live by just one rule: Kids should make all the rules!

programme.title: The Amazing Spiez
programme.desc: Megan is teased by her brothers because she is a poor skateboarder. Then they are called for a mission to investigate strange occurrences in Dubai, involving buildings and other structures breaking down. Later, Megan goes missing after getting her new skateboard that she will use to show her brothers that she can skate. Lee, Marc and Tony find her with an army of skateboarders responsible for breaking down the buildings so they can create skateparks for themselves. (S1 E04)

programme.title: The Amazing Spiez
programme.desc: The Spiez are sent to protect a famous TV spy actor from various incidents. To keep an eye on him, the Spiez are invited to be in his Spy show, with the guidance of their parents who think they won a contest. The actor is kidnapped and the Spiez rescue him. (S1 E05)

programme.title: When I Was Your Age
programme.desc: Paul, 10, is a typical little boy. Except that as soon as someone tells him When I was your age, he is immediately hurled back to the time when the person he is talking to was 10 too. (S1 E10)

programme.title: When I Was Your Age
programme.desc: Paul, 10, is a typical little boy. Except that as soon as someone tells him When I was your age, he is immediately hurled back to the time when the person he is talking to was 10 too. (S1 E11)

programme.title: Get Blake
programme.desc: Blake must master playing a wooden fish for a battle-of-the-bands performance with Skye. Followed by Sixty Second Dennis.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: For a school project, Dennis and Walter both build robots. However, during an accident, both robots merge, causing Dennis and Walter to defend the school. Followed by 'No Joke.'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: To get his friends back from Walter's group, Dennis challenges Walter to a videogames battle. Followed by 'Fish Tale'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Mr De Testa has installed the Confiscat-inator - a state of the art security system for contraband confiscated in class - password encoded and set to be locked tight until 2050! Dennis decides there's only one thing for it - they're going to have to bust open the vault. He knows just the menaces for the job... but someone has to crack the complicated mathematical code - and the only man for the job is Walter. If Dennis can get him to join the gang, then Beanotown school is about to witness the biggest heist it's ever seen.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and his pet dog, Gnasher, live by just one rule: Kids should make all the rules!

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and his faithful hound Gnasher are out to make every day as much fun as possible, but their adventures often lead them into trouble. After a prank misfires and puts the school cook out of action, Dennis and co go undercover to give the pupils a day of school dinners they will never forget - only the headmaster, half a tonne of hyperactive lobsters and a school inspector who looks suspiciously like Walter stand in their way.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis, his friends and Walter's friends get marooned on a desert island when Dennis attempts to escape a boring field trip. Followed by Substitute Creecher

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: The garden is accidentaly wrecked when Dennis tries to give Gnasher a bath, so the gang have to fix the mess before Mum comes home. Followed by 'Run Rabbit Run'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: To avoid getting into trouble, Dennis acts ill, leading him into a boring night in the hospital. Followed by 'Operation Windbreaker'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Believing Gnasher and Gnipper to be trapped in Beanotown Dog Pound, Dennis comes up with a plan to rescue his friends and bring them both home. Followed by more Dennis and Gnasher episodes.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and Co. have to control Pie Face's obsession with pies during the Pie Festival. Otherwise, they will be grounded. Followed by 'Great Outdoors'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Athena gets Gnasher envy when seeing a pampered version of Gnasher in a magazine and when she hears that Dennis owns an Abyssinian wire-haired tripe hound (Gnasher), she wants him. However, being an owner to Gnasher isn't all cracked up to be! Followed by 'Splash'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Gnasher and Gnipper enter a dog show, regardless of Walter saying they don't have true talent. He wants Athena and Miss Mini Wuff to win, but Walter has just underestimated Gnasher's true capabilities. Followed by Grounded.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis breaks Bea's toy horse, so Dennis is searching for a new one to cheer her up. Followed by 'Rock and a Hard Place'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: There's a new computer system which keeps data for the school which works using a memory stick. This gives Dennis an idea, but it makes Walter suspicious. 'The Curse of Madame Gigi'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis plays a prank on the citizens of Beanotown, causing them to evacuate, which causes trouble for Dennis later. Followed by 'No Place Like Home'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher

programme.desc: Tails brings a new friend home to Knothole - a baby Terra-Pod who has strayed from the herd that is currently migrating. Sonic, Sally, and some of the other Freedom Fighters return the Baby-T to its mom and the rest of the herd.

programme.desc: English teacher Penelope Campbell loves her annual summer vacations visiting her Grandma Dot, despite Dot's constant attempts to set her up with every single man in town. This year, she bumps into Jason Humphrey, none other than her childhood sweetheart, who is still as handsome and charming as ever. It's a little awkward at first but the conversation soon turns to Jason's own Grandma Sophie, who keeps doing the same to him! In order to evade the efforts of their matchmaking grandmothers, they make a pact pretending to date each other, but will the old sparks return?

With their friendship on the line, Becks now faces a dilemma: help Casey or risk opening her heart to the love of a lifetime.

programme.desc: After his wife falls under the influence of a drug dealer, an everyday guy transforms himself into Crimson Bolt, a superhero with the best intentions, but lacking in heroic skills.

programme.title: Cybermutt
programme.desc: The powerful dog Rex is injured by a car while rescuing a young scientist from being run over. Feeling responsible for the condition of Rex the scientist uses his skill as a prosthetics inventor to give the dog a new, super-power body.

programme.title: The Accidental Husband
programme.desc: Emma has made a career out of her sensible, and responsible approach to relationships. She has a radio talk show, and a loving relationship with her fiancé, Richard. Then Emma finds out that she is already married to a man she's never met before

programme.title: Legendary
programme.desc: Cal Chetley is a bright, engaging, undersized fifteen year-old who's been picked on most of his life. Cal joins his high school wrestling team in the hopes his brother will train him. More importantly, Cal uses wrestling as the tool to reunite his family.

programme.title: George And The Dragon
programme.desc: A knight (James Purefoy, "Rome") returning from the Crusades takes on a dragon after the disappearance of the kindly Princess Lunna (Piper Perabo, "Coyote Ugly"). With Patrick Swayze.

programme.title: Belly
programme.desc: Two Gangsters have an awakening.

programme.title: A Secret Life
programme.desc: Sarah was living the perfect life with her husband, Jason and their son Brandon until Jason simply disappears.

programme.title: Secret Past
programme.desc: A reporter finds a series of blank cards that may shed some light on her mother's recent life.

programme.title: Fair Game
programme.desc: A CIA operative's identity is leaked by the government as payback for an op-ed article her husband wrote.

programme.title: A Christmas Kiss
programme.desc: A romantic drama in the backdrop of Christmas time in Wisconsin, revolving around two college sweethearts who rekindle their love during the holiday season

programme.title: Feather Christmas
programme.desc: For single dad, and veterinarian, Martin, Christmas is all about upholding regular family traditions to keep the memory of his late wife alive. But when an ailing pet chicken arrives at his home-run animal sanctuary, the family's festive plans, and entire world, are turned upside down, as new love blossoms and spreads its wings!

programme.title: Christmas Miracle (2014)
programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve in the sleepy town of Rockford when Sheriff Rick Langston (Dean Cain, Lois & Clarke: The New Adventures of Superman) arrests a mysterious man who resembles Santa Claus. However, when the townspeople's Christmas wishes all start to come true, the sheriff begins to wonder if this jolly old man just might be the real deal. It is when he is out of love and luck and at his most cynical that the sheriff meets Lucy (Christine Lakin, Valentine\s Day) and is shown the miracle of love and family. As Christmas Day fast approaches, new relationships are forged and existing ties are strengthened in this uplifting festival story for the whole family.

programme.title: Elf Man
programme.desc: An Elf is left behind by Santa to help rescue the Harper family from a lousy Christmas. The Elf and the family get more than they bargained for, as the kids help the Elf discover his special powers and true identity as a budding superhero.

programme.title: Joseph and Mary
programme.desc: During a time of much civil unrest, a holy man, Rabbi Elijah, swears an oath to protect the two young sons of a persecuted man. But while Jesus survives King Herod's slaughter of the innocents, it tragically claims the lives of the boys Elijah swore to protect.Seeking to avenge their deaths, he begins his quest for retribution. But when he meets Joseph, Mary and their young son Jesus, the anger that fuels his revenge is questioned. Elijah is faced with a life-changing choice: should he kill, or should he choose forgiveness, and in doing so, contradict every scripture upheld by his forefathers? With a powerful performance from Kevin Sorbo (Hercules, God's Not Dead), Joseph and Mary, is a stirring story of inspiration and hope, and of mercy versus revenge, set in the years before Jesus became the man who ultimately changed the course of humanity forever.

programme.title: Mara
programme.desc: A twisted, spine-tingling horror based on the ancient legend of the night hag demon - Mara. Criminal psychologist Kate (Olga Kurylenko: Quantum of Solace) is assigned to the murder of a man who has seemingly been strangled in his sleep by his wife and the only witness is their daughter. As Kate investigates she experiences the same petrifying symptoms and spirals through a chilling nightmare.

programme.title: Robot Overlords
programme.desc: Welcome to the ultimate battle between robots and mankind! When teenager Sean (Callan McAuliffe: The Great Gatsby) sets out to join the Resistance, against the robots, the fate of the world lies in his hands. Hot on his heels however, is robot collaborator Mr. Smythe (Ben Kingsley: Iron Man 3). This exhilarating British sci-fi thriller, delivers a bombastic robot takeover that is not to be missed!

programme.title: The True Don Quixote
programme.desc: Down on his luck, Danny (Tim Blake Nelson – HBO's Watchmen) escapes the world by diving deep into the fantasy novels that bring him comfort. Diving a little too deep, he soon begins to believe that he himself is a great knight. Grabbing his cardboard armour, a sword and roping in his trusty squire Sancho (Jacob Batalon), they embark on an insane adventure, where great lessons are learned.

programme.title: Crossing the Line
programme.desc: From the team behind Oscar winners La La Land and Call Me by Your Name. This modern Western showcases breathtaking performances by Tessa Thompson and Lily James, who portray sisters forced into a life of crime to save their family. Faced with betrayal and violence, they risk everything on a drug smuggling mission. A brutally fresh look at all of Americas ills. Winters Bone meets Frozen River.

programme.title: Date with Love
programme.desc: Hollywood star Alex accepts a prom proposal from David an unpopular high school student, to help rebuild her profile. Alex will soon discover the Heidi has a crush on David. (2016)

programme.title: My One and Only
programme.desc: Stephanie enters a TV reality show to discover "the one". Stephanie discovers her inner strength to go for the things she wants, not what others think she should have. (2019)

programme.title: Love On Repeat
programme.desc: When Amber starts re-living the same day over and over again, she realizes she is stuck in limbo and must finally decide what it will take to make her truly happy. Starring Jen Lilley (2019)

programme.title: Love Off the Page
programme.desc: When a hopeless romantic bookworm buys a book at a mysterious bookstore, she starts dreaming about love. Starring Malone Thomas (2022)

programme.title: Cooking Up Love
programme.desc: Zoey, a talented sauce maker, gets fired from her corporate job, so enters a food truck competition

programme.title: The Wedding Arrangements
programme.desc: When talented botanist Violet needs help preparing flower arrangements for a high-profile wedding, she calls upon Jack, a handsome nature photographer who has taken over responsibility for his grandfather's flower shed.

programme.title: How to Find Forever
programme.desc: Marley's brilliant at organizing other people's engagements, but unlucky in finding romance herself. When designing her most important proposal yet, the man who could jeopardize it all may be the one who helps find her own love story.

programme.title: Love's Second Chance
programme.desc: Passionate fashion stylist Rose is living her best life in NYC when she suddenly inherits her grandmother's vintage dress shop and must return to her small hometown. There, she runs into her charming high school crush Cole Murphey, who helps her renovate the store.

programme.title: Mr. Morgan's Last Love
programme.desc: From the day Pauline (Clemence Poésy) lends him a helping hand on the bus, the stubborn and weary Matthew Morgan (Sir Michael Caine) stumbles back to happiness.

programme.title: Elsa And Fred
programme.desc: A withdrawn senior experiences life in new ways when he begins spending time with the free-spirited woman who lives across the hall. Starring: Shirley MacLaine, Christopher Plummer, Marcia Gay Harden

programme.title: Then Came You
programme.desc: A lonely widow plans a trip around the world with her husband's ashes, to visit the places they loved in the movies. The first stop on the journey changes her life forever.

programme.title: Law of Attraction
programme.desc: A young female attorney with ambition to make partner in her law firm, falls for an opposing attorney on a big important case. Will love prevail?

programme.title: Cinderella Pact
programme.desc: Nola, Deb, and Nancy are best friends who create a Cinderella Pact—a weight loss agreement using advice from "fairy godmother" newspaper columnist Bel.

programme.title: Hometown Remedy
programme.desc: A busy surgeon heads back home to celebrate her father becoming mayor. But after a chance encounter with the town's only doctor-and most eligible bachelor-she witnesses true compassion which might be the prescription this doctor needs.

programme.title: Cream of the Crop
programme.desc: High-school Ag Science teacher Jodi Stafford meets commercial real-estate marketing specialist Mike Jared during her struggle to save her family's ailing dairy farm.

programme.title: Passport to Love
programme.desc: Nicole, a successful travel blogger, meets Kade, a marketing rep for a travel publishing company, and they form the beginnings of a relationship while exploring an island destination. They juggle their work traveling around the world while seeing each other again. Both know there's something special between them, but it will be put to the test when Kade's competitive boss challenges Kade to thwart Nicole's business.

programme.title: Finding Love In Sisters
programme.desc: When her mother dies, Esperanza returns to Sisters, Oregon and reunites with her sisters.

programme.title: Obsessions Gone Too Far
programme.desc: Shortly after earning her degree at Northern Kentucky University.

programme.title: VC Andrews' All That Glitters
programme.desc: Ruby is driven from the Dumas mansion and returns to her beloved childhood home.

programme.title: VC Andrews' Hidden Jewel
programme.desc: Ruby is trying to find a new life for her children and desperate to protect them.

programme.title: VC Andrews' Web of Dreams
programme.desc: Web of Dreams', the last Casteel series novel, unravels the family's mysteries.

programme.title: Obsessions Gone Too Far
programme.desc: Shortly after earning her degree at Northern Kentucky University.

programme.title: Stolen Dreams
programme.desc: Laura Paddington is overcome with joy when her daughter, Zoe, returns to her after being abducted 17 years before--but is Zoe really her long lost child?

programme.title: Nash
programme.desc: This coming of age documentary chronicles the life of NBA All Star Steve Nash as he tries to navigate his way through the somewhat toils of professional sports while trying to leave a lasting legacy on and off the court.

programme.title: I Think I Do
programme.desc: The relationship between three sisters, as one is left at the altar on her wedding day.

programme.title: Amber's Story
programme.desc: This is the true story of the kidnapping of Amber Hagerman and how her family came together to help other abducted children as a result of her tragedy which resulted in a new system to help find missing children - The Amber Alert.

programme.title: My Daddy is in Heaven
programme.desc: Becky, Adam and their 5-year-old daughter Acie are a perfect family until a tragic accident during a 4th of July celebration kills their father. Struggling with grief, Becky decides she needs to leave the family farm and all its memories. She leaves Acie with her grandfather Ben and visits with her friend from school, June. With all the best intent, June offers Becky plenty of distraction from her family life. Fueled by her anger at G*d and loss of faith, Becky starts drinking and making other self-destructive choices. Then, after Becky is arrested, Ben threatens to keep Acie until Becky is back on track. A chance encounter in a bus station with a traveler gives Becky what she needs to restore her faith and reunite with her family.

programme.title: Julie & Julia
programme.desc: A woman verging on thirty and frustrated in a temp secretary job takes on a yearlong culinary quest: cook all 524 recipes in Julia Child's "Mastering the Art of French Cooking." She chronicles her trials and tribulations in a blog that catches on with the food crowd.

programme.title: Busy Buddies
programme.desc: The Stooges run a small restaurant, and must come up with some quick money to pay off a pie dealer whose wares they ruined. They enter Curly in a milking contest at the county fair, but his technique leaves something to be desired, and he quickly falls behind the champ. Moe and try to help by putting on a cow suit and pouring milk from a concealed bottle, but when their cheating is exposed, they must leave on the run.

programme.title: Cactus Makes Perfect
programme.desc: The Stooges are living with their mother who persuades them its time to leave home and seek their fortune. After a con man sells them a phony deed to a lost gold mine, the boys head west to find the treasure. After some mishaps with Curly's gold finding invention, they locate the mine and strike it rich. When two crooked miners try to take their gold they hole up in an abandoned hotel and, although they get bombarded by dynamite, triumph over the crooks.

programme.title: Calling All Curs
programme.desc: The Stooges run a pet hospital and get an important patient, Garcon, a rich ladies poodle. When dognappers posing as reporters steal the poodle, the boys are in a tough spot. First they try to fool their client by disguising a mutt as the poodle. When that doesn't work, they use the mutt as a bloodhound to track down the crooks. When they discover the bad guys hideout, Curly defeats them in a fight and they find Garcon, only to discover that "he" has had a litter of puppies.

programme.title: Cash And Carry
programme.desc: The Stooges find a crippled boy and his sister living in their dumpyard shack. To raise money to pay for the little boys operation they buy a phony treasure map from a con man. Thinking the treasure is buried beneath an old house, the boys start digging and wind up in a US treasury vault where they are promptly arrested. The president (FDR) gives them amnesty and arranges for the boy's operation.

programme.title: Crash Goes The Hash
programme.desc: The Stooges are hired as reporters and their first assignment is to get a picture of a visiting prince who is planning to marry a local socialite. The boys disguise as servants and infiltrate a party being in thrown in the honor of the prince. The Stooges ruin the party, but save the day as they expose the prince as crook who is planning to rob the house. Their boss is so grateful for the expose that he gives the boys a bonus and the rich lady decides to marry Curly!

programme.title: Guarding Tess
programme.desc: Shirley MacClaine plays Tess Carlisle, a cantankerous, much beloved former First Lady whose husband died in office nearly a decade ago. Now, far removed from Washington, she directs her extraordinary intelligence to a battle of wills with her bodyguard, Secret Service Agent Doug Chesnic (Nicolas Cage).

programme.title: Did You Hear About The Morgans?
programme.desc: An estranged New York couple witnesses a murder and are placed in a witness-protection program in a small Wyoming town.

programme.title: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: A romantically challenged morning show producer's search for Mr. Perfect has left her hopelessly single. She's in for a rude awakening when her bosses team her with Mike Chadway, a hardcore TV personality who promises to spill the ugly truth on what makes men and women tick.

programme.title: Requiescant
programme.desc: The adopted son of a preacher comes upon a village that is under the thumb of a deranged ex-Confederate officer, who is - among other things - stealing land from the locals with phony land grants.

programme.title: The Star Packer
programme.desc: A gang working for The Shadow is terrorizing the town. John Travers decides to take on the job of sheriff and do something about it.

programme.title: Only the Valiant
programme.desc: Capt. Richard Lance is unjustly held responsible, by his men and girlfriend, for an Indian massacre death of beloved Lt. Holloway. Holloway is killed while escorting a dangerous Indian chief to another fort's prison. The chief escapes. Knowing their fort is in danger of Indian attack, Lance takes a small group of army misfits to an abandoned nearby army fort to defend a mountain pass against the oncoming Indian assault. Their mission is to stall for time until reinforcements from another fort arrive. The men in this small group of malcontents, deserters, psychopaths and cowards all hate Capt. Lance and wish him dead. Much to their chagrin, the men recognize that Lance's survival instincts, military knowledge and leadership are the only chance the group has of staying alive.

programme.title: To Hell and Back
programme.desc: Johnny King, a rebellious drifter, sets out to avenge the death of his mentor and friend, Steve, after he has been murdered for his land by the Ward Brothers.

programme.title: Seven Guns for the MacGregors
programme.desc: Ranch owner MacGregor has seven sons and oldest Gregor leads his brothers to Las Mesas, a small town where they want to sell horses. They get into trouble with local people who are related with evil Santillana. After getting imprisoned and losing their horses they decide to go after Santillana's gang.

programme.title: NEUTRAL PORT
programme.desc: When a German U-boat sinks Captain Ferguson's ship he vows revenge. The intelligence officers wish to follow the U-boat. Captain Ferguson disobeys these orders and breaks navy policy. How will he achieve his mission with his reputation still intact?

programme.title: SMASH AND GRAB
programme.desc: John Forrest is a private detective with a weakness for playing with model railways. When he is hired by an insurance firm to find a gang of smash-and-grab jewel thieves, he is in need of help. As the chase leads him to Ireland, his wife helps him.

programme.title: DOUBLE EXPOSURE
programme.desc: Pete Fleming is a private detective called into service by an advertising executive

programme.title: BAND WAGGON
programme.desc: After being evicted from BBC Broadcasting House, Arthur (Arthur Askey) and his friend Stinker move to a castle where they come upon television equipment which they use to put on a show - not realising that it is in use by German agents.

programme.title: Baby and the Battleship
programme.desc: Two sailors - Puncher, ex-lightweight boxing champion of the Navy and a simple sort of chap and Knocker, the 'bright' boy of the ship - go ashore when HMS Gillingham puts into Naples.

programme.title: Sharknado
programme.desc: When a freak tornado swamps Los Angeles, thousands of man-eating sharks are sucked into the swirling vortex, terrorizing the waterlogged populace and flooding the city with shark-infested seawater. Surfer and bar-owner Fin (Ian Ziering, Beverley Hills, 90210) sets out with his friends Baz (Jaason Simmons, Baywatch) and Nova to rescue his estranged wife April and teenage daughter Claudia from the sharks raining down from the skies. With nature's deadliest killer ruling sea, land, and air, they soon realise that the only way to survive the deadly shark-infested maelstrom is to tackle it head on. Their plan? Commandeer a helicopter and fly close enough to launch bombs directly into the tornado!

programme.title: Rise of the Jurassic
programme.desc: A young scientist and her team arrive at a mysterious island, looking for answers as to what happened to her father who disappeared there years ago. What they find is beyond what any of them expected.

programme.title: Native
programme.desc: A signal from the other side of the universe is received by a hive-like society. Two scientists, Cane and Eva, are chosen to leave home and journey many light years to find and colonise the distant world that sent this transmission. As their telepathic connection to home weakens, they begin to question the morality of the mission and the very meaning of their own existence in the isolation of deep space.

programme.title: The Immortal Wars: Rebirth
programme.desc: Rebirth takes place during the early brutal stages of Dominion Industries. In this story watch Olive and other deviants undergo a series of deadly experiments lead by Laurie Harvey and her team.

programme.title: Dark Star
programme.desc: John Carpenter's pulp science fiction classic - this brilliantly clever and funny parody of Stanley Kubrick's 2001: A Space Odyssey, follows a warped intergalactic mission to blow up unstable planets. Four bored astronauts fill in time between missions catching up on their tans with the help of a sun-lamp, playing with a suspiciously plastic-looking alien mascot they are taking back to Earth and conversing with their female version of Hal. Things start to go horribly wrong when the spaceship computer misfires and a 'smart bomb' thinks it is God.

programme.title: The Water Margin: Both at last Will Reach the Sea
programme.desc: Nearly a thousand years ago in ancient China, there was a cruel government. 108 renegade will try to change the story.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter

programme.title: The Quick and the Dead
programme.desc: A female gunslinger arrives in a small town determined to settle an old score.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels (2000)
programme.desc: They're beautiful, they're brilliant and they work for Charlie.

programme.title: District 9
programme.desc: From producer Peter Jackson and director Neill Blomkamp comes a startlingly original science-fiction thriller where alien refugees, stranded on Earth, are exiled to a slum on the fringes of Johannesburg.

programme.title: Underworld: Blood Wars
programme.desc: The fifth installment of the Underworld franchise.

programme.title: June Again
programme.desc: During a fleeting bout of lucidity from her dementia, June Wilton has precious little time to bring together her estranged children, save the family business, and rekindle an old flame.

programme.title: From the Vine
programme.desc: Mark Gentile travels to Italy after a major humiliation in business. He returns to the tiny village of Acerenza, visiting the vineyard where he grew up and finds it in a state of disrepair, getting the idea to bring it back to life, making wine again.

programme.title: The Magic of Belle Isle
programme.desc: An alcoholic novelist (Morgan Freeman) rediscovers his passion for writing, and for life, when he begrudgingly befriends a single mother.

programme.title: The Architect
programme.desc: While trying to build their dream home, a couple's lives are turned upside down after hiring an obsessive architect who insists on building his ideal home not theirs.

programme.title: The Minute You Wake Up Dead
programme.desc: AS THE BODIES PILE UP, HIS WORLD WILL FALL APART. An investment banker in small town America finds one mistake could cost him his life as his clients lose vast amounts of money. As the threats begin to pile in, one call asks “Where will you be the minute you wake up dead?”.

programme.title: Programming will resume shortly
programme.desc: We're catching up on our beauty sleep! Stay tuned for more priceless entertainment curated by Rakuten TV.

programme.title: Behind The Line
programme.desc: Occupied France, 1940. A Nazi Commander discovers one of his prisoners, Danny (Sam Gittins) is a champion boxer. He forces him to fight for his companies entertainment.

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: The epic adventures of a man who discovers that he possesses the exhilarating ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world he can imagine.

programme.title: The Missing Sister
programme.desc: When Sharon finally tracks down her missing sister Raven, she's elated to be back together – until she begins to suspect that Raven isn't her sister at all, but rather an opportunistic imposter.

programme.title: Saints and Soldiers
programme.desc: Germany, May 1945, deep in the Harz Mountains a U.S. tank crew discovers a platoon of Germans preparing to ambush U.S. supply trucks. A deadly game of cat and mouse quickly unfolds as the Americans find themselves out-gunned and out-manned by three German tanks.

programme.title: King of Hearts
programme.desc: Jamai Raja is an Indian drama series about Siddharth, who marries Roshni to mend her strained relationship with her mother, Durga Devi Patel. The show explores the complexities of family dynamics, love, and duty as Siddharth navigates various challenges to unite his new family.

programme.title: Second Chances
programme.desc: Yash, a rich and esteemed business tycoon, yearns for real love. While he falls in love with Neha, the journey ahead is not going to be an easy one for him. Will he be able to win Nehas heart?

programme.title: Jodha Akbar
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: This is Fate
programme.desc: Arjun spends time with Preeta and the Aroras. When he returns home, Anjali overhears him confessing his feelings for Preeta alone in the car.

programme.title: Trinayani
programme.desc: Trinayani is a woman who can see the future. She decides to use her power to make other peoples lives better. How will things turn out for her when people learn about her extraordinary abilities?

programme.title: The Good Son
programme.desc: Raja Beta is an Indian television drama series that revolves around the life of Vedant Tripathi, an ideal and dutiful son. Vedant is adopted by the Tripathi family and grows up to become a successful gynecologist. Despite facing challenges and prejudice due to his adopted status, he wins the love and respect of his family through his unwavering dedication, kindness, and sense of responsibility.

programme.title: Undercover Love
programme.desc: Behind the facade of running an NGO for hearing and speech impaired children, the demure Jagadhatri Sanyal is, in reality, a fiery intelligence officer code-named JAS.

programme.title: Untangled
programme.desc: Diya, a gully badminton player, meets Arjun, a former badminton champ from an affluent family, who resents his own kin. Will Diya bring back the much-needed positivity and hope in Arujns life?

programme.title: Mehek
programme.desc: Zindagi Ki Mehek is an Indian television drama series that aired from 2016 to 2018. The story revolves around Mehek Sharma, a talented cook from a middle-class family, and Shaurya Khanna, a wealthy and arrogant restaurateur. Their paths cross when Mehek participates in a cooking competition that Shaurya is judging. Despite their contrasting personalities and initial conflicts, they fall in love and face numerous challenges together, including family opposition and personal vendettas. The show blends themes of love, family, and ambition with a strong emphasis on culinary arts.

programme.title: Urban Jungle
programme.desc: We think cities belong to us, but the concrete jungle's teaming with animals - whether its monkeys in Japan, sparrows in Germany, Turkish rats or even Manatee in Florida. We make friends with some, but most go about their lives unseen. Some people see wild animals as pests, and dangerous to our health, others believe they are crucial to our well-being and belong here as much as we do.

programme.title: War Crimes of the Liberators
programme.desc: US soldiers fought for democracy and the freedom of other nations. Yet in the course of military operations, they too committed war crimes. Most of them never followed up on let alone punished. In the wake of the Allies' advance against Hitler's tyranny, there were numerous atrocities committed by the victors, not only in the East. Apart from their medals, some American soldiers also kept a dark secret. GIs killed German Prisoners of War and raped thousands of German women. Estimates of the number of German victims vary widely, and are highly disputed among experts. Not least because they touch on a taboo, since for decades in Germany the subject had been considered as a potential strain on the relation between the Federal Republic of Germany and its Western Allies. According to some historians there were several thousand sexual assaults by American soldiers in Bavaria alone when US forces liberated the region in April 1945. At some invasion beaches in Normandy, only every second germen POW survived. Often, the liberators – shocked by the sight of German atrocities – would fall into a spiral of violence. Very few of these crimes came under investigation by US military courts. Studies by the US War Department hinting at a comparatively high number of transgressions were classified secret.

programme.title: Crime Scene Eulau
programme.desc: This documentary focuses on a spectacular discovery made in a quarry near the village of Eulau, not far from the central German town of Naumburg. Neolithic graves contained the skeletons of three women, two men and eight children, buried tenderly 4500 years ago, some affectionately entwined. In 2008, for the first time anywhere in the world, it was possible to perform a DNA analysis on the earliest evidence of the existence of a nuclear family. This was a sensation - but why did these people all die at the same time? Were they the victims of a violent crime? Who were they, and how did this terrible drama unfold? Archaeologists insist that these victims will not be forgotten, since these days it is possible to do far more than simply date and record such finds. Modern scientific methods have revolutionised archaeology, enabling us to discover how and why the family from Eulau in the German state of Sachsen-Anhalt died 4500 years ago. By enlisting the help of a CID profiler, archaeologists and anthropologists employ state-of-the-art analytical methods to investigate this Stone Age crime. In the process we discover key information about an era before recorded history which has previously been shrouded in mystery - and astonishing information about the composition of the population here also comes to light. It seems that the third millennium before Christ saw two major waves of migration, from Eastern and Western Europe, which determine the composition of the population here. In the middle of what is now Germany these two migratory movements met. Could this be the background to the mysterious murders of Eulau?

programme.title: Scotland
programme.desc: Mysterious castles overlooking lonely lakes, and men in kilts playing the bagpipes whiskey, and the Loch Ness monster: everybody is familiar with the clichés about Scotland. What few people realise, however, is that Great Britain‘s northernmost region also contains fascinating countryside and wildlife.

programme.title: Eagle Lakes
programme.desc: The Lauenburg Lake District is located between Lübeck and Lauenburg on the River Elbe. With more than 470 square kilometres, it is the third largest natural reserve in Schleswig-Holstein. Due to its extensive forest areas, 40 lakes and its proximity to Mecklenburg's biosphere reserve Lake Schalsee, it forms the largest protectoral area alongside the former inner-German border.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Nerves jangle when orangutan Lingga is moved into her new enclosure to meet her housemates. Chimp Jimmy, meanwhile, hurts his leg.

programme.title: Monkey Life

programme.title: Monkey Life
